body: Foreign investors sold a net 98.99 million shares, with major sell-offs in companies like PT Darma Henwa Tbk (-145.79 million shares), PT J Resources Asia Pasifik Tbk (-147.43 million shares), and PT Bumi Resources Tbk (-71.48 million shares). Meanwhile, top buys included PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (552.60 million shares), PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (101.59 million shares), and PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (42.92 million shares).
title: Foreign investors sell majority of shares in mining and banking industries, but buy heavily into digital and energy companies.

body: PT Carsurin Tbk (CRSN) reported a 31.49% year-over-year decline in net profit to IDR 12.92 billion in Q3 2024, driven by low sales, with gross profit increasing to IDR 160.92 billion and operating profit slipping 18.61% to IDR 24.87 billion. The inspection segment remained the main contributor to revenue, generating IDR 245.92 billion, followed by testing, certification, consultation, and goods sales.
title: PT Carsurin's Net Profit Drops 31.49% in Q3 2024 Due to Slowing Sales.
